nasb.text: And Jesus returned to Galilee in the power of the Spirit, and news about Him spread through all the surrounding district.

esv.text: And Jesus returned in the power of the Spirit to Galilee, and a report about him went out through all the surrounding country.

cnv.text: 耶穌帶著聖靈的能力，回到加利利。他的名聲傳遍了周圍各地。

ccb.text: 耶稣带着圣灵的能力回到加利利，祂的名声传遍了周围地区。

csbs.text: 耶稣带着圣灵的能力回到加利利，他的消息传遍了周围所有的地区。
